focused_change.title: PocketDM — offline voiced tiny-model Dungeon Master (Build Small hackathon)

backlog.title: Deploy to build-small-hackathon org Space (Gradio SDK, sdk_version >=6.10, Q4_K_M GGUF + voices baked in). Measure live tok/s; if streamed turn feels broken (<~8 tok/s) execute 0.8B fallback retrain same day.

Submission: verify canonical track-/badge- tag strings in the auth-gated registration app, README frontmatter complete (video + social links), traces dataset published, social post with teaser clip, submit with buffer, re-scan org for near-duplicates.
Publish HF model repo (safetensors + GGUF, apache-2.0, model card with base-vs-finetuned eval table) and dataset repo (filtered synthetic turns + held-out seeds + generation/training traces).
Polish + playtests: scripted sessions + 3 human testers; fixes via Codex. run_local.sh one-liner verified with Wi-Fi off for the demo video beat.
Demo video <=2:00 per PRD storyboard (cold open, turn, reveal badge, Wi-Fi-off beat, montage, receipts, close) + Field Notes blog draft with real cost numbers.

done.title: Bootstrap: public GitHub repo, PRD.md committed with section 5.1 updated to the Qwen3.5-2B ladder, specs/PLAN.md, tasks/lessons.md seeded, codex exec wired and first Codex-attributed commit verified via git log author metadata.

WP-1: engine/schema.py pydantic turn schema (narration, 3 choices, state_delta, is_ending, ending_type) + hand-written engine/grammar.gbnf pinned to it + round-trip tests (valid samples accepted, invalid rejected, GBNF accepts every schema-valid sample).

WP-2: engine/state.py deterministic state machine — hp 0-10 clamp, inventory max 6, delta legality, story-pressure prompt injection by turn count, force is_ending by turn 15, retry-then-canned-bridge fallback. CLI REPL playable against any backend (teacher API or llama.cpp).

WP-0: throwaway free-tier HF Space running stock unsloth/Qwen3.5-2B-GGUF Q4_K_M under llama.cpp; measure sustained decode tok/s and first-token latency on 2 vCPU. Decision recorded: 2B stays primary iff >=10 tok/s, else 0.8B.

WP-3: data/teacher_gen.py Modal app (vLLM Qwen3-32B, xgrammar guided JSON, DM + 3 player personas, full adventures in frozen schema) + data/filters.py gates (schema-valid, narration 2-4 sentences, pairwise choice cosine <0.85, delta legality, profanity). Smoke 50 adventures, inspect, then ~2k overnight.

WP-4: train/finetune.py Unsloth fine-tune of Qwen3.5-2B (full FT preferred, LoRA fallback; completion-only loss, packed sequences, 2-3 epochs, thinking off) on Modal + export_gguf.py producing Q4_K_M (ship) and Q8_0 (comparison). Cost logged.

WP-7: app/server.py gr.Server (Gradio >=6.10) — @app.api endpoints new_game / take_turn (streaming) / tts; llama.cpp with GBNF grammar; kokoro-onnx TTS strictly sequential after decode; engine owns state; no network calls at inference.

WP-8: custom parchment frontend served at / — typewriter streaming via @gradio/client SSE, wax-seal choice buttons, HP hearts, inventory margin, d20 dice animation, proof-of-tininess badge with live tok/s, mute toggle, Begin-adventure click gate for autoplay, mobile responsive.

WP-V: app/voices/build_lore_voice.py — blend Kokoro female voice tensors (start 0.45 bf_emma / 0.35 af_heart / 0.20 af_nicole), audition grid over weights x speeds with a fixed script, pick winner by listening, pedalboard reverb in TTS path for this voice only, save artifact + rebuild kokoro-onnx voices.bin. Blend only from Kokoro voice packs — never game audio.

blocked.title: WP-6: eval/sessions.py — 50 automated grammar-constrained sessions against llama-server (pinned fresh build, Qwen3.5 arch) must complete with zero grammar failures and zero engine fallbacks beyond budget. Runs in CI.
blocked.reason: Implemented eval/sessions.py and GitHub Actions wiring, but the current local 2B Q4_K_M GGUF cannot satisfy the 50/50 grammar-clean gate. A 1-session smoke passed cleanly (14 turns, 0 bridges, 0 raw schema failures), then deterministic evidence at eval/results/grammar-sessions-2-fail.json completed 2/2 sessions but only 1/2 grammar-clean: session 2 used 2 bridge fallbacks, raw_schema_failures=0, gate passed=false. Full 50/50 acceptance cannot pass until the model/data/runtime validation behavior improves or the acceptance budget changes.

blocked.title: WP-5: eval/harness.py — automated metrics (schema-valid without grammar, choice distinctness, delta legality, fallback rate, tokens/turn) + LLM-judge rubric (coherence, choice meaningfulness, ending satisfaction 1-5) as Modal batch on 50 held-out seeds. Base-vs-finetuned table output.
blocked.reason: Eval gate fails for current 2B GGUF. Corrected 50-session judge on full run reports coherence 2.52 (<3.5) with zero-bridge 92%; app-mirrored harness samples using next_turn show zero-bridge 60% then 20%, so current model/runtime needs another data/training iteration before this task can pass.
